updates.note: CM Suvendu Adhikari issued direct orders for a crackdown on syndicate operations, illegal sand and coal mining across West Bengal. He stated the state will adopt a zero-tolerance approach to institutional corruption and syndicate-driven extortion which had suppressed business activity. ↗ Economic Times | May 12, 2026

The state government instructed officials to dismantle alleged syndicate networks operating at the district and block levels, which previously controlled supply and distribution of materials. ↗ Indian Express | May 11, 2026
